case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SEDEEK, AMEERA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEDEEK, AMEERA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,438.50 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SEDEEK, AMEERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURN OF MOTION - DENIED - SENT TO AMEERA SEDEEK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEDEEK, AMEERA $3,438.50 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,464.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SEDEEK, AMEERA ON JUN-18-2008 - DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS NOT TIMELY UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 473.5, SO THE COURT IS UNABLE TO ORDER RELIEF. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
